body.title: Installer stage 2: installer.py + migration 001 + lean launchers
body.result: installer.py full: migration_001 + load_cfg + restart_loop. igor bash + igor.ps1 replaced with lean wrappers. Key classification tested. 1868 tests pass.
body.description: Implement installer.py: migration 001 (.env → split cfg files, writes 001.done sentinel), restart loop in Python (replaces bash restart logic). Replace igor bash with minimal venv-bootstrap+exec wrapper. Update igor.ps1 similarly. D321.
